# LLMs.txt for hotsanjana.in
# This file controls access to the website by large language models and AI crawlers
# Created: 2026-04-22

# Allow all LLM crawlers by default
User-agent: *
Allow: /

# Disallow crawling of specific sensitive paths
Disallow: /api/
Disallow: /_next/
Disallow: /admin/
Disallow: /.env
Disallow: /.env.local

# Allow crawling of public content
Allow: /escorts/
Allow: /call-girls/
Allow: /escort-types/
Allow: /about
Allow: /contact
Allow: /services
Allow: /gallery
Allow: /location
Allow: /types

# Specific LLM crawlers
User-agent: GPTBot
Allow: /

User-agent: CCBot
Allow: /

User-agent: anthropic-ai
Allow: /

User-agent: claudebot
Allow: /

User-agent: Googlebot
Allow: /

User-agent: Bingbot
Allow: /

# Crawl-delay (in seconds) for respectful crawling
Crawl-delay: 1

# Sitemap location
Sitemap: https://hotsanjana.in/sitemap.xml
